title: Student Information System for the Faculty of Management Studies and Commerce
description: A system that enables the administrator of the Faculty of Management Studies and Commerce to access a student's academic information, while allowing the student to update their personal profile. It simplifies the task of maintaining personal records, academic records such as course enrollment, examination results, and overall grade point average (OGPA).

title: Student Enrollment System for the University of Jaffna
description: A system that facilitates undergraduate enrollment at the University of Jaffna. It enables students to enroll for their desired program and assists the admission branch in receiving and processing enrollment applications, sending acknowledgements, assigning registration and index numbers, and generating flexible reports.
